holdings.infoBox: ERET is an equity ETF with a total of 359 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 6.30%, Prologis at 5.84%, Realty Income at 4.81%, Equinix at 4.67%, and Simon Property Group at 3.45%.

overview.description: The iShares Environmentally Aware Real Estate ETF (ERET) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks an index of real estate companies from developed markets weighted based on a target exposure to green certification, energy efficiency, and level of carbon emission intensity. ERET was launched on Nov 15, 2022 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: FTSE EPRA Nareit Developed Green Target Index
